untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires precise peak detection (2 peaks spaced ~50 days) and peak-to-peak height/width asymmetry analysis which cannot be expressed with available bar-by-bar indicators. The pattern also requires regime-dependent logic (bull vs bear market context, left/right peak dominance) that exceeds indicator composition capabilities. Peak spacing and asymmetry assessment require multi-bar pattern recognition beyond single-bar indicator scope.
